arabic: تَطْرَحُ إِشْكَالِيَّةُ التَّعَدُّدِيَّةِ الدِّينِيَّةِ فِي الفِكْرِ الإِسْلَامِيِّ المُعَاصِرِ تَسَاؤُلًا جَوْهَرِيًّا: هَلْ يُمْكِنُ الاعْتِرَافُ بِصَلَاحِيَّةِ مَسَارَاتِ النَّجَاةِ خَارِجَ الإِسْلَامِ دُونَ الوُقُوعِ فِي النِّسْبِيَّةِ الدِّينِيَّةِ التَّي تُفَكِّكُ الخُصُوصِيَّةَ الإِسْلَامِيَّةَ؟
translation: Problematika vjerskog pluralizma u savremenoj islamskoj misli postavlja temeljno pitanje: je li moguće priznavati valjanost puteva spasenja izvan islama, a da se pritom ne upadne u vjerski relativizam koji razgrađuje islamsku posebnost?
translationEn: The issue of religious pluralism in contemporary Islamic thought raises a fundamental question: is it possible to acknowledge the validity of paths to salvation outside Islam without falling into religious relativism that dismantles Islamic particularity?
